title: Transcriptomic analysis of db/+ and db/db day 5 wound keratinocytes
author: Zhang, He
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains bulk RNA-seq data comparing db/+ and db/db mouse keratinocytes from day 5 wound samples. 
  DATASET INFORMATION: 
 
 Dataset ID: 9697-JM - Samples: 6 biological replicates
 
 Species: Mus musculus - Genotypes: db/+ and db/db 
 Tissue: Wound keratinocytes 
 Time point: Day 5 post-wounding 
 Sequencing platform: Illumina NovaSeq 
 Read type: Paired-end 
 File format: FASTQ.gz
